comment: Bundle baseline. Updated 2026-05-11 after wiring @modelcontextprotocol/sdk MCP transport. Delta vs prior baseline (2,606,166 B): +218,217 B. Adds SDK Client + StdioClientTransport + SSEClientTransport pulled by src/mcp/sdkTransportFactory.ts (wired in src/main.ts) to replace NOOP transport that threw on every connect. SDK is bundled — esbuild platform: browser, format: cjs single-file output cannot code-split; node builtins (child_process, stream) stay external. Cap reset to 30 KB for incremental tuning on top.
